title: Technical Validation — Pre-Deploy Checklist
status: PENDING BUILD — validation checks defined, awaiting actual build

build_passes.action: npm run build must succeed with new loan-scenarios route + /loan-payment-table + /data

all_urls_200_locally.action: curl -I localhost:3000/loan-scenarios/* for all 5 slugs. Verify HTTP 200.

canonical_correct.action: Each page must have self-canonical <link rel='canonical' href='https://qfinhub.com/loan-scenarios/[slug]'>

sitemap_correct.action: 6 deployable URLs must appear in sitemap.xml. Verify after build.

no_noindex_on_approved.action: Verify no <meta name='robots' content='noindex'> on any of the 7 URLs

mobile_rendering.action: Manual check or screenshot test. Tables must be responsive.

schema_valid.action: Rich Results Test or manual validation of BreadcrumbList + SoftwareApplication schema

no_placeholder_content.action: Grep for 'coming soon', 'under construction', 'TBD', 'lorem ipsum' — must return 0 results on deployable pages

no_empty_sections.action: Verify all content sections have actual content on deployable pages. /data mortgage section OK to be marked as planned.

no_duplicate_metadata.action: Check all 7 titles and metas are unique. Already validated in duplication audit.

loan_calculator_still_safe.action: Verify /calculators/loan-calculator renders correctly after build. No regression.

blog_20k_still_safe.action: Verify /blog/20000-loan... renders correctly. Only change is optional contextual link addition.

build_risks.new_route_conflict: Adding /loan-scenarios/[slug] may conflict with existing routes. Check no other route uses this prefix.
build_risks.data_hub_conflict: Adding /data route may conflict. Verify no existing /data route.
build_risks.build_time: Adding 7 new pages should not significantly increase build time — they're content pages, not heavy compute.
build_risks.sitemap_integration: New pages must be added to sitemap generation. Check sitemap.ts or equivalent.

recommended_build_order: 1. Create /loan-scenarios/[slug]/page.tsx (dynamic route, reads from content data)
2. Create content data file: src/data/loan-scenarios.ts (all 5 page contents)
5. npm run build → fix any errors
7. Manual HTTP 200 check on all 7 URLs
8. Deploy only if ALL checks pass
note: Full validation requires actual build. These checks are defined and ready — execute them after code generation.
